english_text:
Safety is Inversely proportional to Freedom
Safety is directly proportional to Restraint
Safety
Freedom
Restraint
alt_text: Mathematical-style graph: a red curve labelled 'Safety' (high on the y-axis, dropping toward the x-axis labelled 'Freedom') intersected by a blue diagonal line labelled 'Restraint'. Captions: 'Safety is Inversely proportional to Freedom' (top) and 'Safety is directly proportional to Restraint' (bottom).
notes: Pedagogical diagram contrasting safety/freedom/restraint — typically used in ethical/sharia discussion of why limits enable safety.
